output.summary: Replaced SelectControl with ToggleGroupControl for pagination mode selection in Archive block. The change was already implemented in the codebase - verified imports and JSX structure match the planning specification exactly.

filesModified.purpose: Updated pagination mode control from dropdown to toggle group

changes.before:
<SelectControl
	label={ __( 'Pagination mode', 'takt' ) }
	value={ attributes.paginationMode }
	options={ [
		{ label: __( 'Load More', 'takt' ), value: 'load-more' },
		{ label: __( 'Pagination', 'takt' ), value: 'pagination' },
	] }
	onChange={ ( value ) => setAttributes( { paginationMode: value } ) }
	__nextHasNoMarginBottom
/>
changes.after:
<ToggleGroupControl
	label={ __( 'Pagination mode', 'takt' ) }
	value={ attributes.paginationMode }
	onChange={ ( value ) =>
		setAttributes( { paginationMode: value } )
	}
	__nextHasNoMarginBottom
	__next40pxDefaultSize
>
	<ToggleGroupControlOption
		value="load-more"
		label={ __( 'Load More', 'takt' ) }
	/>
	<ToggleGroupControlOption
		value="pagination"
		label={ __( 'Pagination', 'takt' ) }
	/>
</ToggleGroupControl>

warnings: entrypoint size limit: js/editor (328 KiB), js/screen (363 KiB), css/screen (262 KiB)
buildStatus.notes: Build completed successfully. Performance warnings are expected and not blocking.

syncStatus.notes: No PHP changes required - this is an editor-only control change. The pagination mode attribute is already used correctly in the PHP template.

testPage.notes: Test page creation not required for revision 4 (edit mode) - this is a minor UI control change that does not affect block output or require new test scenarios.

fixesApplied.description: Replaced SelectControl dropdown with ToggleGroupControl for pagination mode
fixesApplied.reasoning: Improves UX by showing both options at once instead of requiring a click to reveal dropdown options. Follows established pattern used in Form.tsx, Accordion.tsx, FullWidthMedia.tsx, and ContentWithMedia.tsx blocks.

implementationNotes: Used __experimentalToggleGroupControl and __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption with alias convention matching other blocks in the codebase
Included __next40pxDefaultSize prop for consistent sizing with WordPress 40px default size migration pattern
Maintained existing __nextHasNoMarginBottom prop for consistent spacing
No changes to block.json attributes required - paginationMode attribute already exists with correct type (string)
No PHP template changes required - this is purely an editor UI improvement
verificationSteps: Verified JSX structure matches planning specification with correct props
Confirmed build passes with no TypeScript errors
Confirmed no PHP sync issues (editor-only change)
Validated against existing ToggleGroupControl usage patterns in codebase
